TENTATIVE DECISION ISSUED & CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT ROSENDIN ELECTRIC, INC. A CALIF. CORP. COOPERAGE DEVELOPMENT CO, BUSINESS ENTITY UNKNOWN ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $390.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $390.40, COSTS AWARDED TO DEFENDANT ROSENDIN ELECTRIC. IT IS ALSO ADJUDGED & ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF PATERSON SHALL RECOVER THE SUM OF $5000.00 FROM SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC; AND SURETY'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. COSTS AWARDED TO COOPERAGE DEVELOPMENT =$390.40.
